Rows: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
FROM schools
WHERE StatusType = 'Merged' 
  AND County = 'Orange'
  AND DOC IN ('54', '52')
question: What is the ratio of merged Unified School District schools in Orange County to merged Elementary School District schools?
